# Cross-Solver Validation: Statistical Analysis

Comparing boot_cold's floor/pocket mechanism against its own cold variant, independently for CP-SAT, Gurobi, and CPLEX, on both job-shop (disjunctive MIP) and knapsack domains.

## Pairwise: boot_cold vs cold, per solver

| domain | solver | n | cold_mean_pi | boot_mean_pi | pi_win | pi_tie | pi_loss | final_win | final_tie | final_loss | sign_test_p | wilcoxon_p | mean_pi_improvement | ci95_lo | ci95_hi | sign_test_p_holm |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| jssp | cpsat | 30 | 0.0005 | 0.0002 | 24 | 0 | 6 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0014 | 0.0000 | 0.0003 | 0.0002 | 0.0003 | 0.0014 |
| jssp | gurobi | 30 | 0.0042 | 0.0023 | 28 | 0 | 2 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0000 | 0.0000 | 0.0019 | 0.0014 | 0.0024 | 0.0000 |
| jssp | cplex | 30 | 0.0034 | 0.0016 | 25 | 0 | 5 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0003 | 0.0000 | 0.0018 | 0.0013 | 0.0023 | 0.0006 |
| knapsack | cpsat | 30 | 0.0198 | 0.0043 | 29 | 0 | 1 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0000 | 0.0000 | 0.0155 | 0.0121 | 0.0186 | 0.0000 |
| knapsack | gurobi | 30 | 0.0030 | 0.0001 | 30 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0000 | 0.0000 | 0.0029 | 0.0001 | 0.0086 | 0.0000 |
| knapsack | cplex | 30 | 0.0005 | 0.0001 | 29 | 0 | 1 | 0 | 30 | 0 | 0.0000 | 0.0000 | 0.0003 | 0.0003 | 0.0004 | 0.0000 |
